since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.06%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +1.07% · Gold +1.14% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.06%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.06%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.17%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.17%, MU +3.92%, AMAT +3.84%, LRCX +3.82%, KLAC +3.64%. Laggards: DLR -3.73%, EQIX -3.58%, CRM -2.58%, NOW -1.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.56% at $150.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.56% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
